name: Shubha Banerjee
heroHeadline: Large-scale backend systems, event platforms, and secure cloud-native infrastructure.
heroSubheadline: I design and build production Go services, microservice architectures, event-driven platforms, Kubernetes delivery systems, and security-aware backend infrastructure for teams operating at scale.
seoTitle: Shubha Banerjee | Senior Backend Engineer | Golang
seoDescription: Senior Backend Engineer with 6+ years of experience in Golang, microservices, Kafka, Redis, Kubernetes, Terraform, PostgreSQL, cloud infrastructure, and secure backend systems.

about.title: Backend engineer focused on scale, reliability, and secure delivery.
about.body: I am a Senior Backend Engineer based in Kolkata and Bangalore with 6+ years of experience building microservices, event-driven platforms, cloud-native applications, and production CI/CD systems. My strongest work is in Golang, Kafka, Redis, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, PostgreSQL, gRPC, and secure backend architecture. I like systems that are observable, maintainable, and ready for real operational pressure.
bullets: Large-scale Go services, microservices, and distributed backend platforms
Kafka, Google Pub/Sub, Azure Service Bus, Redis, PostgreSQL, and gRPC
Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, BlackDuck, SonarQube, and secure delivery practices
Strong interest in cybersecurity, networking, reliability, observability, and robotics-ready infrastructure

finalCta.title: Need a backend engineer for production-scale systems?
finalCta.body: Reach out for Golang backend engineering, cloud-native services, event-driven platforms, infrastructure automation, or security-aware delivery work.
